query: INSERT INTO current (workspace_id, skill_id, commit_id, epoch, seq, record, updated_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7) ON CONFLICT (workspace_id, skill_id) DO UPDATE SET commit_id = excluded.commit_id, epoch = excluded.epoch, seq = excluded.seq, record = excluded.record, updated_at = excluded.updated_at
